footer.tagline: The reliable link between clinic and lab.

hero.title: The reliable link between clinic and lab
hero.subtitle: LabLink transports medical samples and supplies between clinics and laboratories — on time, every time.

highlights.heading: What We Do
highlights.card1Desc: Safe, compliant transport of diagnostic samples from clinic to laboratory under chain-of-custody conditions.
highlights.card2Desc: Reliable delivery of lab consumables and medical supplies between partner facilities.
highlights.card3Desc: Regular, planned pickup and delivery routes tailored to your clinic and lab schedules.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Contact us to arrange a pickup time that fits your clinic's workflow.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your samples are transported in compliant, temperature-appropriate containers with full chain-of-custody documentation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your partner laboratory receives the samples and confirms delivery. Simple, reliable, documented.

about.heading: About LabLink
about.missionText: LabLink exists to make the transport of medical samples and supplies between clinics and laboratories fast, safe, and fully compliant. We believe healthcare providers should spend their time on patients — not on logistics.
about.storyText: [Placeholder — founding story to be supplied by stakeholder. Example: LabLink was founded by healthcare logistics professionals who saw first-hand how unreliable sample transport was causing delays in diagnoses and patient care.]
about.val1Desc: Every sample tracked, documented, and delivered to the right destination.
about.val2Desc: Consistent schedules and response times your clinical team can depend on.
about.val3Desc: Adherence to transport regulations for biological substances at every step.
about.regulatoryText: [Placeholder — specific certifications and regulatory standards to be confirmed by stakeholder before publication. LabLink operates in accordance with applicable regulations for the transport of biological substances.]

services.heading: Our Services
services.intro: LabLink provides a range of courier services specifically designed for the healthcare sector. All services are subject to confirmation of stakeholder details.

diagnosticTransport.title: Diagnostic Specimen Transport
diagnosticTransport.desc: Transport of diagnostic samples (Category B, UN3373) from clinic to laboratory under full chain-of-custody conditions.
diagnosticTransport.includes: Compliant packaging · Chain-of-custody documentation · Temperature monitoring (where required)

routineRuns.title: Routine Inter-Clinic Sample Runs
routineRuns.desc: Scheduled, regular pickup and delivery routes between partner clinics and laboratories.
routineRuns.includes: Fixed schedule slots · Route optimisation · Confirmation of receipt

urgentPickup.title: Urgent / On-Demand Pickup
urgentPickup.desc: When time-sensitive samples cannot wait for the next scheduled run, our on-demand service dispatches a courier promptly.
urgentPickup.includes: Priority dispatch · Rapid response · Real-time status updates

supplyDelivery.title: Lab Supplies & Consumables Delivery
supplyDelivery.desc: Delivery of laboratory consumables, reagents, and medical supplies between partner facilities.
supplyDelivery.includes: Careful handling · Scheduled or on-demand · Proof of delivery

tempControlled.title: Temperature-Controlled Transport
tempControlled.desc: [Subject to confirmation] Transport of samples or supplies requiring controlled temperature conditions.
tempControlled.includes: Validated cool-chain containers · Temperature logging · Compliant handling

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subheading: Get in touch to discuss how LabLink can support your clinic or laboratory.

form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your clinic or lab, the type of transport you need, and your typical volumes.
form.consent: I agree to LabLink processing my contact data to respond to this enquiry, in accordance with the privacy policy.
form.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
form.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 20 characters.
form.consentRequired: You must agree to the privacy policy to submit.
form.submitSuccess: Message sent! We'll be in touch shortly.
form.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

meta.aboutDescription: Learn about LabLink's mission, values, and commitment to reliable medical sample transport.
meta.servicesDescription: Specimen transport, urgent pickups, routine sample runs, and lab supply delivery for clinics and laboratories.
